issues.description: First effect has wrong trigger. Official text says '[Main]' which means this is an Event card activated from hand, not 'OnPlay'. Event cards should use 'Activated' trigger.

Second action in first effect is completely wrong. The text says 'trash cards from the top of your Life cards until you have 1 Life card', which is not 'RemoveLife'. This should likely be a special action or use FlipLife with specific logic to reduce life to exactly 1.
First action says 'up to 1' which means optional (count 0-1), but DSL doesn't specify this is optional

actions.comment: Trash life cards until you have 1 remaining
